allow: PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 50240 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { "port 3000 STILL in use by $\($still.OwningProcess\)" } else { "port 3000 free" })

PowerShell($still = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { "port 3000 in use by PID $\($still.OwningProcess -join ','\)" } else { "port 3000 FREE" })
